title: Zinc Macerate
description: Allows zinc (from create) to be macerated in a modern industrialization 2 macerator
body:
Can be installed by either datapack or mod.

Allows zinc ore to be macerated for 2.5 raw zinc, and raw zinc to be macerated for 1.5 crushed raw zinc. (3.75 zinc from 1 ore)

![The macerator recipe window. Zinc ore is the input on the left and 2.5 zinc ore is the output on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc6c9cd6a192505ab57285815e1199c79cb236f.png)

![The macerator recipe window. Raw zinc is the input on the left and 1.5 crushed raw zinc is the output on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0518bc6c515c21b4658279f58d00bed91461b391.png)
